name: opportun-ai-t
description: Opportun-AI-t — autonomous career agent challenge MVP

scripts.build: npm run build -w @opportun-ai-t/core && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @opportun-ai-t/core && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run test -w @opportun-ai-t/core && npm run test -w @opportun-ai-t/agent
